sections.paragraph: m. he-goat (perhaps ready and prompt for fighting; comp. عَتَدُ a horse ready for the course), Gen 31:10, 12 Gen 31:12, and frequently. Arab. عَتُودُ id. Used of the leader of a flock, Jer 51:40 metaph, of a leader of the people, Isa 14:9 Zec 10:3 (compare κτίλος, Il. iii. 196).
